title: macropsychanthus umbrinus
intro: Macropsychanthus umbrinus, also known as the "shade Psychanthus," is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Macropsychanthus umbrinus include relief from fever, sore throat, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic for wounds and cuts. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the leaves and stems of the plant.
